pages.raw_text:
The board of county commission
ers are today sending out circu-
lar letter to all the taxpayers in
this county, with the view of OBJ
tanning their sentiment in regard
to the proposed new bridge to be
built over Hangman creek-wheth-
er the county shall bear the entire
expense, or the expense be borne
by the Washington Water Power
company.


1t is proposed to replace the high
trestle over. Hangman creek at
Seventh avenue with a fill at an
estimated cost of 100000. The
Washington Water Power com
pany has offered to pay 5 per cent
interest on 100000, or $4,000 a
year, for franchise to lay tracks
and operate cars over the same.
This payment is equal to about
$50, 900 cash. The county has been
asked to contribute $4,000, the bal
ance to be paid by the city.
